title: cotinus metopium
intro: Cotinus metopium, also known as the smoke bush or copal tree, is a small deciduous shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as scopoletin and scopoletin glucoside. The health benefits of Cotinus metopium include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of conditions, including skin infections, bronchitis, and digestive issues.
